justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted the user's initial time preferences and subsequent requests for earlier slots.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered alternative slots when the user's preferred time was unavailable and successfully booked the chosen alternative.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent handled the conversation efficiently, understanding the user's requests and providing relevant options without unnecessary turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the user's needs and providing clear options.
